name: claude
description: Use Claude from Codex to review legal deliverables, run adversarial critiques, or delegate general tasks. Symmetric to OpenAI's codex-plugin-cc on the Claude Code side.

interface.shortDescription: Invoke Claude from inside a Codex session
interface.longDescription: The Claude plugin is the symmetric counterpart to OpenAI's codex-plugin-cc. It exposes three skills inside Codex: claude-review (cross-model legal-document review through the claude-review MCP, round-capped per matter), claude-adversarial-review (devil's-advocate critique through the same MCP), and claude-rescue (general task delegation via the claude --print CLI for code, debugging, or non-legal investigation). Routing is automatic based on the work type — legal deliverables go through the round-capped MCP, everything else goes through the CLI.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this debugging task to Claude
